title: Cape | Better Capes
description: Select your own Cape for Free! No Account Needed!
body:
## Custom Capes

![Cape Select Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de3d6df86e5b24206fa952e71deccbca6a16153f_0.webp)

With this mod, you have two options:

1. Choose from a variety of **pre-installed capes**.
2. Upload your own **[Custom Capes](https://bettercapes.net)** (up to **4K resolution**).

**Official website:** https://bettercapes.net

---

### Important
Only players who have this mod installed will be able to see your cape.

---

### Usage
1. Install the mod.
2. Open the cape selection screen and choose a cape.

That’s it:
- **No** additional costs  
- **No** account required  

---

### Controls
Open the Cape Selection Screen via:
- **Keybind:** `N`  
- **Button:** Skin Customization tab
